mechanism: The dollar's position on the smile provides a real-time discriminator for the correlation regime: risk-off dollar strength corresponds to negative correlation (demand shocks dominant), while US exceptionalism dollar strength corresponds to positive correlation (supply shocks/fiscal dominance). DXY at 100-107 maps to the transitional middle.
regime_dependence: The mechanism behind any dollar break matters more than the level. Recession-driven weakness (EM outflows) vs. twin-deficit-driven weakness (EM inflows) discriminates between correlation regime states.
